name: Do I get future medical for ongoing tinnitus from work noise?

mainEntity.name: Do I get future medical for ongoing tinnitus from work noise?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if doctor deems necessary for work-related loss; covers aids, visits, therapy.** Permanent awards include future care estimates.[1][4] Prove ongoing relation. Insurers resist; fight via rating docs.[2] Lifelong monitoring possible.
